creator: freebsd@dussan.org
text:
I was building packages with poudriere for jail with owncloud server. After all packages were successfully compiled, I try to update and upgrade jail. I got the following error:

root@cloud:~ # pkg upgrade
Updating FreeBSD repository catalogue...
FreeBSD repository is up-to-date.
All repositories are up-to-date.
Checking for upgrades (64 candidates): 100%
Checking integrity... done (1 conflicting)
pkg: Cannot solve problem using SAT solver:
cannot install package ImageMagick~graphics/ImageMagick, remove it from request?


I was building packages several times and always got same error for graphics/ImageMagick-6.9.0.0_1,1.

uname -a:
FreeBSD xxx.dussan.org 10.1-RELEASE FreeBSD 10.1-RELEASE #0 r274401: Tue Nov 11 21:02:49 UTC 2014     root@releng1.nyi.freebsd.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64
